name: Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main"]
  workflow_dispatch:  # manual trigger from GitHub UI

env:
  UV_VERSION: "0.5.11"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.12"
  GCP_REGION: "us-central1"
  AGENT_NAME: "gcp-finops-agent"
  AGENT_ENTRY: "gcp_finops_agent"
  MAX_AGE_HOURS: "24"

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write  # required for Workload Identity Federation

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          workload_identity_provider: ${{ secrets.GCP_WORKLOAD_IDENTITY_PROVIDER }}
          service_account: ${{ secrets.GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT }}

      - name: Set up gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2
        with:
          project_id: ${{ secrets.PROD_PROJECT }}

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install uv
        run: pip install --quiet uv==$UV_VERSION

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: uv sync --all-extras

      - name: Clean up old Reasoning Engines
        run: |
          uv run python deploy/cleanup_old_engines.py \
            --project=${{ secrets.PROD_PROJECT }} \
            --region=$GCP_REGION \
            --max-age-hours=$MAX_AGE_HOURS

      - name: Deploy to Agent Engine
        run: |
          uv run adk deploy agent_engine \
            --project=${{ secrets.PROD_PROJECT }} \
            --region=$GCP_REGION \
            --staging_bucket=gs://${{ secrets.AGENT_ENGINE_STAGING_BUCKET }} \
            --display_name="$AGENT_NAME" \
            $AGENT_ENTRY
